name: Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, sugar, and egg together until smooth.
2. Gradually add molasses and beat well to combine.
3. Sift in the dry ingredients (flour, salt, soda, cinnamon, ginger, cloves) and mix until a dough forms.
4. Roll the dough into small balls.
5. Roll each ball in white granulated sugar.
6. Place the sugar-coated balls about 2 inches apart on a baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes.
Randy Rigg
